docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER'S MOTION TO DETERMINE RESPONDENT'S LIEN
NOTICE OF MOTION TO DETERMINE RESPONDENT'S LIEN; MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER WANG, LIAN QING HEARING SET FOR JUL-23-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
DECLARATION OF DONALD E. KRENTSA FILED BY PETITIONER WANG, LIAN QING
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-23-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER WANG, LIAN QING AS TO RESPONDENT DEPART OF HEALTH CARE SERVICES

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER LIAN WANG'S MOTION TO DETERMINE RESPONDENT'S LIEN IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Determine Respondent'S Lien; Motion
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth Hammack Bailey, Esq. of Meisel & Krentsa, Tel. 415.788.2035, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER LIAN WANG's Motion To Determine Respondent'S Lien is Granted. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Not Reported.
